---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement, feature, or enhancement
title: 'Feature: '
labels: [enhancement]
---

## Summary

Short description of the requested feature.

## Motivation / Use case

Why is this feature important? Who benefits and how?

## Proposed solution

Describe the approach, API and UX changes, and any required data/model changes.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Clear user-visible behavior described
- [ ] Backwards compatibility considered
- [ ] Tests or e2e checks defined

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you evaluated and why they were not chosen.

## Additional context

Links to related design docs, mockups, or prior discussions.

---

ES (breve): Describe la mejora, objetivo y criterios de aceptación.
